data.title: Polkadot's DOT trades at $1.32, eyes $1.40 resistance. Bears at $1.28. RSI at 37.26 hints at possible turnaround.
data.description: The cryptocurrency DOT is currently trading at $1.32 per token, showing mixed technical signals. The bulls are aiming to break through the resistance level of $1.40, while the bears are closely monitoring the support level at $1.28. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) is at a neutral value of 37.26, indicating a possible upcoming reversal in the market trend.
U.S. Senate Reaches Deal to Lift DHS Shutdown for Majority of Operations – Politico

data.description: The digital currency Dogecoin is currently trading at $0.09, showing a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 45.19 and a bearish Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) momentum. Technical analysis indicates a period of consolidation, with a possible increase towards the $0.10 resistance level expected in the next four weeks.

data.title: MATIC tests support at $0.38, RSI at 38. Price could reach $0.43-$0.45 by April 2026 if above moving averages.
data.description: The cryptocurrency MATIC is currently trading at $0.38 with its Relative Strength Index (RSI) standing at 38, indicating a critical support level being tested. Analysts predict a possible rebound towards the $0.43-$0.45 range if buyers take charge and the price climbs above the moving averages.

data.title: Solana aims for $95 rebound despite hurdles, $88 resistance key, $80 support crucial. Bulls target $95-$100, bears watch for $80 breakdown.
data.description: SOL is currently facing a significant challenge at the $88 resistance level, with technical indicators showing a mixed outlook. If the bullish scenario plays out, the price may target the range of $95-$100. On the other hand, bears are monitoring the possibility of a breakdown below the $80 support level.
